channel.title: tips on My Hugo
channel.description: Recent content in tips on My Hugo

item.title: My docker that runs hugo
item.description: Setup Run By default the script runhugo accept a list of folder as toplevel content section clean target folder generate the site and watch the input folder to updte Example runhugo Note: the default topleve list is kbase simba books bookmarks To run interactively runhugo -i kbase simba books bookmarks hugo -w --cleanDestinationDir # alternately you can specified config and themem # runhugo -i -c config-my.

item.title: Link Failure on AIX
item.description: AIX linker calls all static constructors in archieves ignoring whether that module is imported or not, which leads to unused modules are forced to be pulled into the target application. This is a different behavior from other compilers.

item.title: VIm Tips
item.description: convert format between recipe action description dos <–> unix set ff=unix set file-format (unix/dos) and save convert tab/space set et (no)et: expand tabs then run retab to apply convertion

item.title: Jira Tips
item.description: jira filter for plan touchstone q4 filter='Touchstone unresolved' and fixVersion=2018.Q4 order by priority desc, issuetype asc, issuekey desc

item.title: Some Tips of Express.js
item.description: Parsing POST data Start from Express 4.16 app.use(express.json()) app.use(express.urlencode({extended: true})) // app.use(express.multipart()) // security concerns? // URL encoding // POST: name=foo&color=red // or JSON encoding // POST: {"name": "foo", "color": "red"} app.post('/url', (req, res) => { // your POST data is req.body var name = req.body.name }) Express 4.0 to 4.15 npm install --save body-parser and var body_parser = require('body-parser') app.use(body_parser.json()) app.use(body_parser.urlencode({extended: true}))

item.title: Hugo Tips
item.description: Page Basic Info variable description .Title title item in front-matters .File file pathname relative to home (…/.index.md for sections) .IsHome true only for home page (this is quite obviously) .IsNode true for node (none-leaf-node in the content tree), including home page .IsPage true only for leaf-node, false for all nodes and home .
